[[Moff/Legends|Moff]] '''Gandril''' was the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] official who governed several worlds in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]], including the [[Haldeen sector/Legends|Haldeen sector]]. He ordered that the execution of [[Justice Action Network]] founder [[Earnst Kamiel]] was to take place on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Haldeen]], and allowed each of the 54 [[Star system/Legends|systems]] that Kamiel had a death penalty in to contribute a member of the firing squad.
